texto: My mom's always been a good cook, so I took a lot of stuff from her, but most of the stuff I took from Emeril or Bobby Flay right off the TV and make it. I just loved to cook, so it just became a thing. It's a release. Even if I'm alone, I'll cook a full meal, maybe even a two-course meal, just because I love to cook. It's my secret love!
explicacao: Citação de Christian Kane sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My mom's always been a good cook, so I took a lot of stuff from her, but most of the stuff I took…” articula amor, love, good em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como good e alone.

frase_original: My mom's always been a good cook, so I took a lot of stuff from her, but most of the stuff I took from Emeril or Bobby Flay right off the TV and make it. I just loved to cook, so it just became a thing. It's a release. Even if I'm alone, I'll cook a full meal, maybe even a two-course meal, just because I love to cook. It's my secret love!
